title: Llohgun's Lodgings
description: A personal modpack designed with the intent for friends to easily download & join with no hassles or commitments.
body:
## DESCRIPTION:
This is a **Vanilla+** pack designed with Atmosphere, Exploration, Quality of life, and fun in mind! The intention is for easy access for p2p play on a forever world!

Below are a list of keybinds & mods you should be aware of. Highly recommend you look through the mod list to see what else there is to offer!

### KEYBINDS:
- Toggle Shaders - F7
- Shader Selection - F6
- Zoom - C
- Backpack Open/Close - B
- Freecam - Num3
- Show/Hide Roughly Enough Items - Ctrl + O
- Show Accessories: H

### CONTENT MODS:

- **[Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories):** Equip items into an accessory slot, such as hats, lantern, elytra's, & more!

- **[Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll):** Use your Elytra like a plane! Fairly difficult to use but very fun and rewarding. *Feel free to toggle off.*

- **[Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure):** Take pictures in minecraft! Adds a highly in-depth camera!

- **[Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons):** Seasons change every 28 days, affecting the look of biomes & crop growth speed!

- **[Falling Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree):** Instantly chop trees with a new axe enchantment!

- **[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated):** Adds more crops and cooking recipes!

- **[Hang Glider](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider):** Early form of an Elytra! Not compatable with rockets.

- **[Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting):** Paint on a canvas! My personal favorite mod.

- **[Map Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases):** Vanilla friendly mini/world map overhaul using vanilla maps!

- **[Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod):** Create music using instruments and music sheets!

- **[Simple Hats](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hats):** Adds a ton of cosmetic hats to wear!

- **[True Ending](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-ending):** A Ender Dragon Overhaul!

### QUALITY OF LIFE MODS:

- **[Better Ladders](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ladders):** Place ladders without supporting blocks!

- **[Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod):** Holding Shift while bridging allows you to place block in front of you!

- **[Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic):** Reroll enchants for cheap!

- **[Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff):** Various QOL changes to horses.

- **[Inventory Management](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management):** Sort your Inventory!

- **[Magnum Torch](https://modrinth.com/mod/magnum-torch):** Prevent mob spawning in a large radius.

- **[Mine Spawners](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-spawners):** with a Silk Touch pick!

- **[Right Click Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest):** Use a hoe to instantly replant crops. The better the hoe the bigger the area!

- **[XPlus Autofish](https://modrinth.com/mod/x+-autofish):** Automatically cast and reel your fishing rod!

- **[You're in Grave Danger](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd):** Adds graves at your death location, allowing you to retrieve your lost items!

### OTHER MODS:

- **[Better Nether Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-nether-map):** Map out the Nether!

- **[Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person):** Third person camera overhaul! May be disorienting at first, so *feel free to toggle off.*

- **[Breaking Bedrock](https://modrinth.com/mod/breakingbedrock):** Break Bedrock with a netherite pickaxe!

- **[Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam):** Press *Num3* to go into freecam mode and view the world!

- **[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr):** Instanced per-player chests!

- **[Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds):** Horses get better as you use them!

- **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify):** Optifine zoom!

- **Various Decorations Mods:** [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), [Dark Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-paintings),

- **Various Immersion Mods:** [Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves), [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain), & more!


<details>
<summary>CURRENT ISSUES</summary>

 - Structure doors will sometimes only open bottom/top half
 - Floating Vines

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

`Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/`

</details>
